IDF rescue ops at 'several incident sites' in central Israel. 6 more US airmen killed in KC-135 crash identified (Pentagon). Iran FM Araghchi calls French FM Barrot (IranIntl). 100 (capped, rising).

Israeli FM says no plans for direct talks with Lebanese government (Hindu). 826+ killed. 6 Beirut suburbs under evacuation order. 100 (capped, rising).

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments since condemning Pakistan. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation closely. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months (Independent). No major new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. No new China/Taiwan developments. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING. No new DPRK developments since 10-missile salvo on Mar 14. Kim Yo Jong condemns Freedom Shield. 47 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Same cycle data. EU extends Ukraine sanctions 6 months after Hungary/Slovakia deadlock (Independent). Russia continues aerial bombardment. Trump calls Zelensky 'far more difficult' than Putin. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: AP confirms Zardari 'red line' statement — Taliban drones crossed red line by targeting Pakistani civilians (AP). Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities and TTP tunnel infrastructure Sunday (WION/Economic Times). 115K Afghans, 3K Pakistanis displaced per UNHCR (Wikipedia). Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT:
- Iran: IRGC launches 10+ hypersonic missiles at US base in UAE. Sejjil ballistic missile deployed. Multiple strike waves continue.
- Israel-Lebanon: Hamas official killed in Sidon. FM rejects Lebanon talks. 6 suburbs evacuated. 826+ dead.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Zardari 'red line' crossed. Kandahar strikes ongoing.
- US losses mounting: 6 airmen identified dead in KC-135 crash.
- ZERO diplomatic off-ramps. Nine trackers at imminent/critical.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches 10+ hypersonic missiles at Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE) targeting US forces
latest_news.text: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps launches 10+ hypersonic missiles and drones at Al-Dhafra Air Base in UAE, targeting US forces for 'intelligence-support role in invasion of Iran.' Base hosts US, French, and UK military assets.

latest_news.headline: IDF rescue operations at 'several incident sites' in central Israel
latest_news.text: Israeli rescue and recovery operations underway at 'several incident sites' in central Israel following Iranian aerial attack. Multiple impact sites reported including Bnei Brak (cluster munition hit apartment) and Ramat Gan.

latest_news.headline: Hamas official killed in Israeli strike on Sidon, Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli strike kills Hamas official Wissam Taha in apartment building in Sidon's northern district. Sidon hosts Lebanon's largest Palestinian refugee camp, previously struck by Israel targeting Hamas.

latest_news.headline: 6 US airmen killed in KC-135 crash during Operation Epic Fury identified
latest_news.text: Pentagon identifies 6 Air Force airmen killed when KC-135 refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq on Mar 12. Crew from 6th Air Refueling Wing (MacDill AFB) and 121st Air Refueling Wing (Rickenbacker ANGB). Cause under investigation.

latest_news.headline: Israeli FM says no plans for direct talks with Lebanese government
latest_news.text: Israeli Foreign Minister states Israel has no plans for direct talks with the Lebanese government, effectively shutting down diplomatic channels while military operations expand into Beirut.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi calls French FM Barrot on war situation
latest_news.text: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi holds phone call with French counterpart Jean-Noel Barrot to discuss US-Israeli war on Iran and regional situation. No details on outcomes.

latest_news.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei formally confirmed as Iran's new Supreme Leader
latest_news.text: Mojtaba Khamenei, son of assassinated Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, chosen as Iran's new Supreme Leader on Sunday. Leadership succession completed amid ongoing war.

latest_news.headline: Iran claims attacks on US bases in Iraq and Kuwait
latest_news.text: Iran launches multiple barrages of missiles claiming strikes on US military bases in Iraq and Kuwait as part of ongoing retaliatory operations.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 13:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION CONTINUES:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): MAJOR ESCALATION — IRGC launches 10+ hypersonic missiles at Al-Dhafra Air Base (UAE) targeting US forces. New weapons class entering conflict. IDF rescue ops at multiple sites in central Israel. 6 US airmen killed in KC-135 crash identified. Iran FM calls French counterpart. Mojtaba confirmed as Supreme Leader.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Hamas official killed in Sidon. Israeli FM rejects talks with Lebanon. 6 suburbs evacuated. 826+ killed. Expanding into Beirut core and Sidon.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Zardari 'red line' crossed. Kandahar strikes ongoing.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING).

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING).

(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25 (RISING).

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Hypersonic missiles now deployed in conflict. US losses mounting. Coalition cohesion degrading.
